query_title: Escaping the Madhouse: The Nellie Bly Story

recommendations.title: The Dead Girl
recommendations.overview: The clues to a young woman's death come together as the lives of seemingly unrelated women begin to intersect.

recommendations.title: The Trials of Cate McCall
recommendations.overview: In order to be reinstated to the bar and recover custody of her daughter, a hotshot lawyer, now in recovery and on probation, must take on the appeal of a woman wrongfully convicted of murder.

recommendations.title: The Keeping Hours
recommendations.overview: A supernatural love story that centers on two parents whose life together falls apart after their son dies. The man, now a successful lawyer, and the woman, now married and an author, get a chance at reconciliation ten years later.

recommendations.title: Petals on the Wind
recommendations.overview: This sequel to Flowers in the Attic picks up 10 years after Cathy, Chris and Carrie managed to escape Foxworth Hall.

recommendations.title: The Round Up
recommendations.overview: A faithful retelling of the 1942 "Vel' d'Hiv Roundup" and the events surrounding it.

recommendations.title: Andhadhun
recommendations.overview: A series of mysterious events changes the life of a blind pianist who now must report a crime that was actually never witnessed by him.

recommendations.title: Asylum
recommendations.overview: A young psychiatrist applies for a job at a mental asylum and must pass a test by interviewing four patients. He must figure out which of the patients, is in fact, the doctor that he would be replacing if hired.

recommendations.title: Like Crazy
recommendations.overview: Two mental patients with opposite personalities ditch their Tuscan hospital and embark on an unpredictable exploration of the real world.

recommendations.title: Veronika Decides to Die
recommendations.overview: After a frantic suicide attempt, Veronika awakens inside a mysterious mental asylum. Under the supervision of an unorthodox psychiatrist who specializes in controversial treatment, Veronika learns that she has only weeks to live.

recommendations.title: Gonjiam: Haunted Asylum
recommendations.overview: The crew of a horror web series travels to an abandoned asylum for a live broadcast, but they encounter much more than expected as they move deeper inside the nightmarish old building.
